context_for_next_testing_agent: SEO fix is complete and verified. SSG generates pre-rendered HTML content for all pages (home, service pages, FAQ, references). The build process is: yarn build -> postbuild runs SSG -> serve build. Key files: /app/backend/generate_static_direct.py (SSG generator), /app/backend/templates/ (Jinja2 templates). The 404 errors in console are for missing uploaded images, not a code issue.

seo_fix_verification.fix_applied: SSG templates now generate full HTML content inside <div id='root'> that React hydrates
